title: Create 5 shell scripts for mix_lambda experiments

requirements: Each script references corresponding YAML config file
Set unique output/log directories per lambda variant
acceptance: New directory created: verify by test -d R-KV/weian_script/aime24_official_sampled8/speckv_similarity/
5 shell scripts created: verify by ls R-KV/weian_script/aime24_official_sampled8/speckv_similarity/run_speckv_similarity_lambda*.sh | wc -l = 5
Each script references correct config: verify lambda01 → sample8_speckv_similarity_lambda01_aime24_official.yaml
Scripts are executable: verify by test -x R-KV/weian_script/aime24_official_sampled8/speckv_similarity/run_speckv_similarity_lambda01.sh
Unique output directories: verify each script has different --method-output-dir and --log-dir

context: 5 YAML config files created for different lambda values
Config files specify sparse_use_similarity=true and different mix_lambda values

shared_context.design_pattern: Shell script wrapper for experiment dispatch
conventions: Set -euo pipefail for strict error handling
Use absolute paths via PROJECT_ROOT variable

artifacts.usage: Template for shell script structure and environment setup
artifacts.contains: Shell script boilerplate, environment variables, dispatcher invocation pattern

pre_analysis.action: Load context package for artifact paths and smart context
Read reference script template for structure and patterns
